# ADR-XXX — <Decision Title>

## Status

Proposed / Accepted / Rejected / Superseded

---

## Context

Describe the situation that led to this decision.

Explain the technical problem or requirement.

---

## Decision

Clearly state the chosen solution.

Explain why this option was selected.

---

## Alternatives Considered

List other possible options that were evaluated.

Example:

- Option A
- Option B
- Option C

Explain briefly why they were not chosen.

---

## Consequences

Describe the impact of this decision.

Include both:

- positive outcomes
- possible limitations

---

## Reasoning

Explain the reasoning behind the final decision.

Focus on engineering trade-offs and long-term maintainability.
